productDisplayName: Q&Q Women White Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!   Product Details Case style: Stainless steel rectangular case with crystal embellishments Dial style: White dial with silver hands and silver print on the dial Strap style: White genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial and a screw to reset time Water resistance of 3 ATM Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 25 mm Case thickness: 7 mm
